loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing total power quality issues and specific THD event counts for panel-3; some harmonic and diagnosis columns are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing event timeline for 7 out of 7 primary members; 2 members (BPDB-06 Lam-11&12, BPDB-05 Lam-09&10) have no data and render as blanks.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing AI narrative summary for PCC-Panel-3 feeders; roster identifiers updated to real member names (UPS-07, UPS-08, BPDB-06, BPDB-05, UPS-10, UPS-11, UPS-12). Some members (BPDB-06, BPDB-05, UPS-10) have no live data and will render as dark/blank in the roster.

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-feeder I-THD and V-THD from member meters; some feeders (BPDB-06, BPDB-05, UPS-10) have no live data and are blanked.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing harmonic distortion (H5, H7, I-THD, V-THD) and power metrics for the panel's outgoing feeders; 3rd harmonic, K-factor, and peak-THD are not measured by this meter's member assets.
